roa.docketEntryComment: Advisement and Waiver - DUI Advisement of Rights, Waiver, and Plea Form (First Offense DUI)

/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/X:REPORT INDICATES ONE VICTIM: ZIAD ELCHAAR HAS NO RESPONSE OR DECLINED RESTITUTION REQUESTS/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO THE ABOVE VICTIM AND THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTIONOVER RESTITUTION MATTERS/CONTPROB/

/TWS/CH6 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 1D/CTS 1/PF145 18/VF2 150/FOP1  9 MONTH/LCEM/LVAL/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION  UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:07-25-19/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:APD/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL STATES TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE HAS ALREADY PAID THE RESTITUTION/X:COLLECTION OF FINES & FEES ($150 RF, $40 COA, $30 ICNA AND $4 PENALTY) ARE SUSPENDED UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3//4019HALF/

/CAL:DISPO/INTC/INTNC/X:TZELTAL INTERPRETER, CONCEPTION CRUZ-MENDEZ, IS PRESENT AND ASSISTING DEFENDANT WITH THE SPANISH INTERPRETER/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT #6, VC 23103, MISDEMEANOR, WITHIN THE MEANING OF 23103,5VC, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV& PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 6/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/DEF:RESERVES RIGHT TO DEMURRER/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DEF:PLACED ON 2 HOURSTANDBY/
/CAL TO SET OR DISPO/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL: SET OR DISPO/X: TZELTAL INTERPRETER IS UNAVAILABLE/X: TZELTAL INTERPRETER ORDERED/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: SET OR DISPO/DAWT/CONT/SB: 2 HOURS/X: NO INTERPRETER ORDERED (TZELTAL INTERPRETER)/
/INTC/X:TZELTAL INTERPRETER- CONCEPCION CRUZ MENDEZ PRESENT AND ASSISTING DEFENDANT WITH THE SPANISH INTERPRETER,/CONTD:PRETRIAL/X:DAW UNLESS DISPO/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/INTC/X:THE DEFENSE STATES THE DEFENDANT NEEDS ATZELTAL INTERPRETER AT  THE NEXT COURT DATE/ /CONT/DOP/
